tweets.author: tradingstrategies.work
tweets.text:
First, the mix-up nobody clears up:

200-WEEK line = a long-term floor (the Bitcoin one everyone cites).
200-DAY line = a fast trend filter that flips several times a year.

This is about the 200-DAY version. Not the same tool.
